meta.title: About
meta.description: Learn how Power On Interio approaches residential and commercial interiors across India with practical planning and reliable execution.

hero.title: Residential and commercial interiors planned with clarity across India.
hero.paragraphOneSuffix: We design for how people actually use the space, then stay close to execution so the finished result matches the brief.
hero.paragraphTwo: Our focus is practical planning, premium finishes, and a smooth handover that feels organised from start to finish.

approach.title: A clear process with disciplined execution.
